name: newtondb
description: A correctness-first, TypeScript-native JSON document database.

scripts.api:check: npm run build && api-extractor run --config api-extractor.json && api-extractor run --config api-extractor.node.json && api-extractor run --config api-extractor.testing.json
scripts.api:report: npm run build && api-extractor run --local --config api-extractor.json && api-extractor run --local --config api-extractor.node.json && api-extractor run --local --config api-extractor.testing.json
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/write-build-manifest.mjs
scripts.benchmark:qualify: npm run build && node --expose-gc benchmark/run.mjs --profile qualification --output .benchmark/qualification.json
scripts.docs:check: npm run build && npm run docs && node scripts/docs-check.mjs
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && publint && attw --pack . --profile esm-only
scripts.test:crash: npm run build && node scripts/crash-harness.mjs && node scripts/process-lock-harness.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run api:check && npm run test:crash && npm run coverage && npm run pack:check && npm run security:check

author: Alex Berriman <alexb@bezz.com.au>
